title: Semester/University Cancellation or Withdrawal
content:
Semester/University Cancellation or Withdrawal
Morgan State University - Office of the Registrar

This guide is for STUDENTS. It explains how to cancel your enrollment for a semester or withdraw from the university entirely.

---

STEP 1: UNDERSTAND CANCELLATION VS WITHDRAWAL

Cancellation: Removing yourself from all courses before or during the add/drop period. There are no academic consequences. Courses are removed from your record.

Withdrawal: Removing yourself from all courses after the add/drop period has ended. A grade of "TW" (Total Withdrawal) will appear on your transcript. This counts as attempted credit but does NOT impact your GPA and does NOT count as completed credit.

---

STEP 2: UNDERSTAND ACADEMIC DEADLINES
Per the Academic Calendar:
- Cancellation is available through the last day of add/drop.
- Withdrawal is available through the last day of classes.
- Your request is processed as of the date you submit the form.

---

STEP 3: UNDERSTAND TUITION AND FINANCIAL IMPLICATIONS
- There may be financial repercussions per the university's tuition and fees policy.
- Review your housing contract for any implications.
- Students receiving federal funding may face financial aid repercussions.

---

STEP 4: ENTER YOUR INFORMATION
Enter your name and major.

---

STEP 5: REVIEW UNIVERSITY POLICIES
Review the following policies before proceeding:
- Cancellation and Withdrawal policy
- Academic Deadlines
- Tuition and Fees policy
- Financial Aid Funding policy

---

STEP 6: SELECT SEMESTER AND YEAR
Select the semester and year: Fall, Spring, Summer, or Winter.

---

STEP 7: SELECT TYPE AND REASON
Select whether you are requesting a cancellation or withdrawal.

IMPORTANT: Completing this form removes you from ALL courses for the selected semester. If you only need to drop an individual course, see the registration instructions online instead.

Select your reason:
- Financial
- Military Deployment
- Medical/Health
- Personal
- Transfer
- Other

---

STEP 8: SUBMIT
Submit the form. A retention advisor will contact you after submission. The request is processed by the following offices:
- Office of the Registrar
- Residential Life and Housing
- Financial Aid
- Bursar

Processing takes up to 15 business days. The effective date of your cancellation or withdrawal is the date the form was submitted.

For the full official guide with screenshots, view: [Withdrawal and Cancellation Guide](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1ghXcLsWhYQu2bSdXYi5UWtuv7dt7wuBy/view)
